_meta.author: sshahaider
_meta.title: Comments
_meta.description: A fully functional comment system component with support for replies, user avatars, and animated UI using framer-motion. It includes individual cards for comments and replies, shows how long ago each was posted, and allows the current user to delete their own entries. A form at the bottom handles new comment or reply submission, and a skeleton loader appears while replies are loading—giving it a polished, interactive feel for blogs, posts, or discussion threads.
